EasySaveDocs
Table of Contents

Namespace ProjetEasySave.ViewModel

Classes

LanguageService

Provides internationalization and translation services for the EasySave application. This class implements the Singleton pattern to ensure a single, thread-safe instance manages all translations.

SaveJobState

Represents the real-time execution state of a specific backup job. Implements INotifyPropertyChanged to allow seamless data binding with the UI.

ViewModel

The central ViewModel for the application, acting as the intermediary between the View layer and the underlying Models. Manages application state, UI translations, business logic routing, and background monitoring tasks.

Made with docfx
